note: seq=91: FIX investor-visible issues. (1) RATE FEED -- atlas_rate_bridge publishes status/hetzner/rate-stats.json with a COMPLETE live-rate block (intake + enrich per_min/hr/day) so the V5 cockpit rate panels stop showing 'connecting...' (point them at rate-stats.json; ATLAS Flow keeps reading throughput.json). (2) INTERSERVER MEASURABLE -- the same exporter computes a REAL per-box split: InterServer's enrich rate = combined rate x InterServer's ACTIVE enrichment-connection share from pg_stat_activity (measured, labeled, not guessed) -> rate-stats.json by_box.interserver shows a true per-min/hr/day whenever there's work. (3) NEVER-IDLE -- a continuous bounded re-enrichment backfill (50k/run, 20min timer) keeps the queue non-empty so BOTH boxes (esp. InterServer) always have work to process + apportion, instead of an empty queue showing 0. rate_bridge verified complete (76L, __main__, ends clean, compiles).

steps.note: seq=91: rate-stats.json + measured per-box InterServer split + continuous backfill (never-idle).

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_rate_bridge.py':'468da78993e82ac147a1a0898c5d9142cb1190d0dc8889b3a62fb08e15ace437'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('rate sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS rate bridge (rate-stats.json + per-box InterServer split)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_rate_bridge.py
TimeoutStartSec=50

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS rate bridge timer (60s)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=20s
OnUnitActiveSec=60s
AccuracySec=5s

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS continuous re-enrichment backfill (keeps both boxes busy; bounded)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=ATLAS_REQUEUE_N=50000
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_requeue.py 50000
TimeoutStartSec=120

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS backfill timer (20min -- never-idle)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=2min
OnUnitActiveSec=20min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); [ (s.run(['systemctl','enable',u]), s.run(['systemctl','start',u])) for u in ['atlas-rate-bridge.timer','atlas-backfill.timer'] ]; [ s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed',v]) for v in ['atlas-rate-bridge.service','atlas-backfill.service'] ]; s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-backfill.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-rate-bridge.service']); print('rate-bridge + continuous backfill live')"
